# Small Service Instructions

## Coding route

This is a small Coding Repository. The repository map is intentionally kept here.

| Task | Read | Verify |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Change greeting behavior | `src/greeting.js`, then `test/greeting.test.js` | `package.json` `test` script |

Never read Git-ignored paths. `.picm/` is maintainer-only context.
